title: Session 7: Derivatives of Sine and Cosine
content:
« Previous | Next »
Overview The sine and cosine functions are used to describe periodic phenomena such as sound, temperature and tides. Trying to differentiate these functions leaves us with two limits to investigate further.
Lecture Video and Notes Video Excerpts Clip 1: Derivative of sin(x), Algebraic Proof
